title: Playwrite Halloween Colour Your Own Mug | Party Bag Fillers for Kids, Paint Your Own Sets for Kids and Adults
features: Plastic Mug with Halloween themed paint your own images
3 assorted spooky Halloween scenes to colour to create your own personalised mug
Make excellent Halloween party bag fillers
description: Plastic drinking mug with printed paper which can be coloured and decorated to create your own personalised mug. 3 assorted Halloween scenes.
